headline: RBC Capital Maintains Sector Perform on Moderna, Raises Price Target to $45

headline: ValuEngine Weekly Market Summary And Commentary
summary: US equity markets were mixed over last week, with broad index performance modestly positive but sector leadership uneven. The S&P 500 ETF gained 0.56% but the NASDAQ 100 ETF declined 1.55%.
